childElements.name: DRE_AssessmentEnvelope

childElements.name: SaveResponses
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "ContextId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_RequestReferenceId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "remoteClass" : "discoveryfrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteOptions" : { "Assessment.Name" : "%AssessmentName%", "Assessment.AccountId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_AccountId%", "Assessment.ContactId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_ContactId%", "Assessment.AssessmentEnvelopeId__c" : "%AssessmentEnvelopeItemId%" }, "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
